falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (previous 2024 high) by Day 14
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout invalidates the 'bottom' pattern and proves the HOLD signal incorrect

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to >2.5x the 20-day average on 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Explosive volume confirms a breakout/reversal, contradicting the 'unknown' phase and HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day ADX crosses above 25 while RSI >60
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Strong trend confirmation invalidates the 'unknown' verdict by proving a clear directional move

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
